subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory! Praise be to God that in these divine days thou hast been made the recipient of the boundless showers of His mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی لله الحمد در ایام الهی بامطار رحمت نامتناهی فائز شدی از
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
